ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Nobilissimis academicis Otiosis Scipio Gonzaga S. D.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Inc: `Cuperem ego quidem eum me esse, ...` Expl.: ...atque vos ad virtutem iam dudum inflamati estis. Valete. Patavii Cal. April. 1566`
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
